title: Register modularshoot creative mode tab and populate via BuildCreativeModeTabContentsEvent

reference_files.reason: Creative tab description - BuildCreativeModeTabContentsEvent, per-variant ItemStack, icon, ordering
M1 milestone scope - creative tab requirement

acceptance_criteria: Creative mode tab 'modularshoot' registered via DeferredRegister<CreativeModeTab> in ModularShoot.CREATIVE_MODE_TABS
Tab has appropriate icon (gun item or placeholder)
BuildCreativeModeTabContentsEvent listener registered on mod event bus
Event listener iterates all registered gun definitions and creates an ItemStack for each (with GunData component set to the gun ID)
Each gun variant is added as an independent ItemStack with preset DataComponent (not a blank gun item)
Tab contents populate after world load (dynamic registry data available), empty/placeholder in main menu is expected behavior
